# CONTEXT.md Section Index

`CONTEXT.md` is a generated historical mirror. Do not read it whole. Use this
index to locate relevant sections.

## Stable-numbering rule

Section numbers are an **immutable contract** — ADRs and `.scratchpad` issues
cite them. When the vault adds content, **append** new sections; never renumber
existing ones.

## By work area

| If you're working on… | Read sections |
